mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate over the trailing 3 months lowers the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows, mechanically raising present value and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC between FEDFUNDS trend and 20-day forward returns stays below 0.03 over any rolling 2-year walk-forward window.

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE rises more than 0.3 percentage points above its trailing 6-month average, it signals a labor market inflection that historically precedes earnings downgrades, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day forward returns are positive in more than 55% of triggered instances, or Rank IC < 0.03 across two consecutive rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Strong retail sales growth (RSAFS) combined with a low or falling federal funds rate (FEDFUNDS) jointly signal robust consumer demand under accommodative financing conditions, compounding into positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter that neither series predicts alone.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS 3-month annualized growth > 4% AND FEDFUNDS below its 12-month moving average
regime_hint: monetary easing with resilient consumer demand
failure_condition: Joint-signal Rank IC does not exceed the maximum of the two single-series Rank ICs by at least 0.02 over any rolling 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A positive month-over-month trend in industrial production (INDPRO) reflects expanding manufacturing output and corporate revenue momentum, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as markets price in improved near-term earnings visibility.
failure_condition: 5-day forward return correlation with INDPRO trend falls below 0.03 Rank IC over any rolling 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A deceleration in nonfarm payroll growth (PAYEMS) below a 3-month annualized rate of 1% signals weakening labor demand that leads equity markets to reprice growth expectations downward, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the following 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns after triggered instances are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05) across at least two independent 3-year evaluation windows.

mechanism_narrative: During a monetary tightening cycle, a sustained decline in housing starts (HOUST) signals broader interest-rate-sensitive demand destruction that precedes a slowdown in consumer and corporate spending, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
candidate_trigger: HOUST declines > 10% year-over-year while FEDFUNDS is above its 24-month moving average
failure_condition: The negative HOUST-forward-return relationship reverses or weakens to Rank IC > -0.02 specifically during tightening-cycle subsamples over any rolling 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A rising real policy rate, proxied by FEDFUNDS growing faster than CPIAUCSL inflation, tightens effective financial conditions beyond what either series indicates alone, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS year-over-year change exceeds CPIAUCSL year-over-year change by more than 1pp
failure_condition: Joint real-rate signal fails to outperform single-series FEDFUNDS model by Rank IC margin of 0.02 over any rolling 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: In a late-cycle regime where industrial production (INDPRO) growth stalls while payroll growth (PAYEMS) remains elevated, the resulting labor-productivity mismatch signals margin compression risk, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as this combination is a leading indicator not captured by either series independently.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO 3-month growth < 0.5% AND PAYEMS 3-month annualized growth > 1.5%
regime_hint: late-cycle expansion with tight labor market
failure_condition: Triggered instances show positive or flat 5-day forward returns in more than 55% of cases across two separate rolling 3-year windows.
